PurposeOfObligation: Payment for transportation cost during the election cycle for events or campaign related needs. This includes payment back for gas prices, or any other form of transport. The campaign events include, four different meetings in Allegheny, four trips up to Covington, One Drive to Newcastle and several events in Richmond, DC and Charlottesville. All of which required gas before or afterwards at several different gas stations.

Payment for any and all meals during the campaign that were covered by the candidate. This includes meals at fundraisers or meetings such as the lemon and Vale in Newcastle or meals after events.
